summary:
Fixed the goroutine leak.

Changes in app/main.go:
1. Added context-aware computation. The background goroutine and the heavy‐work loop now exit early when r.Context() is cancelled (client disconnects or request timeout).
2. Removed accidental duplicate import and ensured proper imports.
3. computeHandler now:
   • Passes r.Context() to performComputation  
   • Selects on ctx.Done() while waiting for the result  
   • Gives the worker 30 s max, returning 504 otherwise.
4. performComputation respects ctx.Done() each iteration and during sleep delays (using a timer).

Running test.sh now reports:

Baseline goroutines: 4  
Goroutines after 20 client disconnects: 4  
Leaked goroutines above baseline: 0  
PASS: Goroutines properly cleaned up after client disconnect  
PASS: All goroutine lifecycle tests passed
